name: BMM_VALUE_SET_SPEC
documentation: Definition of a range-constrained class whose value range is defined by reference to a 'value set' within an external resource, e.g. a reference data service.

resource_id.name: resource_id
resource_id.documentation: Identifier of a resource (typically available as a service) that contains legal values of a specific type. This is typically a URI but need not be.

value_set_id.name: value_set_id
value_set_id.documentation: Identifier of a value set within the resource identified by `_resource_id_`, which specifies the set of legal values of a type. This might be a URI, but need not be.
